Post._content:
Hello there, this is AronnaxM's first diary.

[![Typing SVG](https://readme-typing-svg.demolab.com?font=Fira+Code&size=18&pause=1000&center=%E7%9C%9F%E7%9A%84&vCenter=%E7%9C%9F%E7%9A%84&multiline=true&repeat=%E7%9C%9F%E7%9A%84&width=435&lines=Opportunities+don't+come+to+people%2C;Only+people+look+for+opportunities.+)](https://git.io/typing-svg)

This blog is powered by the following Websites/Tools:

![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Visual%20Studio%20Code-blue?logo=visualstudiocode)   ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Node.js-grey?logo=nodedotjs)   ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Vercel-black?logo=vercel)   ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Hexo-black?logo=hexo)   ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Markdown-grey?logo=markdown)    ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ngrok-1F1E37?logo=Ngrok)

And these two guys are the ~~maker & designer~~ Dreamer:

![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Github-AronnaxM-orange?logo=Github)   ![Static Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Github-HilaryLouis-purple?logo=Github)

By the Way, We use the theme called [Redefine](https://github.com/EvanNotFound/hexo-theme-redefine)(And one of my frie).

That's the end of my first diary, let's build from here.
